description: Manual classification of 爱弥斯 voice clips into normal (常态) and mecha (机甲) modes, verified by listening.

manual_split_ratios.description: Override the automated classifier's split ratio (0-1) for specific files. Only set for files where the classifier picks the wrong point.

reference_ids.description: Fish Audio voice model IDs, uploaded once and reused via --fish-reference-id. Preferred for the article pipeline is `lively_20s`; the two singles are kept as backups for A/B testing.

lively_20s.note: 022_自我介绍 (10.6s) + 250ms silence + 009_讨厌的食物 (9.8s); lively + chuckle
